title: Ryanair investigated over charging parents to sit with children
summary: UK regulator investigating Ryanair's practice of charging parents to sit with children, raising consumer protection and anticompetitive practice concerns.
content: The UK's competition regulator is investigating the airline over charges it imposes on parents to sit next to their child.

zh.title: 瑞安航空因向家长收费让孩子坐在一起而被调查
zh.summary: 英国监管机构正在调查瑞安航空向家长收费以便让孩子坐在一起的做法，这引发了消费者保护和不公平竞争行为的关切。

title: Korea fines e-commerce giant $400m over data breach affecting millions
summary: South Korean authorities issued a record $400 million fine against an e-commerce giant after a data breach exposed the private information of 37.5 million users.
content: The record fine comes after around 37.5 million users had their private data exposed.

zh.title: 韩国因数据泄露事件对电商巨头罚款4亿美元
zh.summary: 韩国当局在电商巨头发生数据泄露事件后对其处以创纪录的4亿美元罚款，该泄露事件导致3750万用户的个人信息被曝光。

title: Hugo Boss pops 6% after top shareholder Frasers launches $2 billion takeover offer
summary: Hugo Boss stock surged 6% following a $2 billion takeover bid from Frasers Group, which already owns approximately 26% of the fashion retailer.
content: British retail group Frasers owns a roughly 26% stake in Hugo Boss.

zh.title: 最大股东Frasers发起20亿美元收购要约后，Hugo Boss股价上涨6%
zh.summary: Frasers Group发起20亿美元收购要约后，Hugo Boss股价上涨6%，该集团已拥有这家时尚零售商约26%的股份。

title: Investors brace for a 'long grind' as Iran war escalation dims hopes of an early end to hostilities
summary: As U.S. and Iranian military forces escalate strikes against each other, investors increasingly expect the conflict to become prolonged rather than quickly resolved.
content: As U.S. and Iranian forces continue exchanging strikes, investors are increasingly grappling with the possibility that the conflict could become more prolonged.

zh.title: 伊朗战争升级使早期结束冲突的希望渐淡,投资者为"长期苦战"做准备
zh.summary: 随着美国和伊朗军事力量互相升级攻击,投资者越来越预期这场冲突将延长而非迅速解决。

title: Stock futures rise as U.S. completes strikes against Iran: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock futures rose following American military strikes on Iran, though earlier losses in chip stocks and Middle East tensions had weighed on markets overall.
content: A rout in chip stocks and ramp-up in Middle East tensions pulled down the major averages on Wednesday.

zh.title: 美国完成对伊朗的军事打击后股指期货上升:实时更新
zh.summary: 美国对伊朗进行军事打击后,股指期货上升,虽然芯片股早期下跌和中东局势紧张对整体市场造成了压力。

title: Parents find lifeline in 50p kids' clothes shop
summary: A second-hand children's clothing shop is experiencing surging demand as families cut costs and seek affordable alternatives for kids' clothes.
content: A second-hand shop selling cheap baby clothes sees rising demand as families cut costs.

zh.title: 家长在50便士儿童服装店找到救命稻草
zh.summary: 二手儿童服装店需求激增,家庭为削减开支并寻求儿童衣物的廉价替代品。

title: Social media on trial: Four important cases to watch
summary: The BBC examines four significant lawsuits among thousands facing social media companies, highlighting major legal challenges confronting the industry.
content: Social media firms face thousands of lawsuits, the BBC looks at four which could be significant.

zh.title: 社交媒体受审：四个值得关注的重要案件
zh.summary: BBC审视了面临社交媒体公司的数千起诉讼中的四起重要案件，强调了该行业面临的主要法律挑战。

title: OpenAI mulls slashing prices as it competes with Anthropic for users: WSJ
summary: OpenAI is reportedly considering substantial price cuts for its AI models to compete with Anthropic and capture a larger share of the AI market.
content: OpenAI is reportedly mulling drastic price cuts to its AI models, as it looks to woo consumers from rival AI company Anthropic, the WSJ reported on Wednesday.

zh.title: OpenAI考虑大幅降价与Anthropic竞争用户：WSJ
zh.summary: 据报道，OpenAI正在考虑对其AI模型进行大幅降价，以与Anthropic竞争并争夺更大的AI市场份额。

title: United Auto Workers reaches deal with Dauch Corp after 10-day strike
summary: The United Auto Workers union reached an agreement with Dauch Corp following a 10-day strike at its Three Rivers, Michigan manufacturing facility.
content: This comes after a 10-day strike against the company at its Three Rivers, Michigan plant

zh.title: 美国汽车工人联合会与Dauch公司达成协议，结束10天罢工
zh.summary: 美国汽车工人联合会与Dauch公司在其密歇根州三河工厂进行10天罢工后达成协议。

title: Inside India newsletter: Hollywood is debating AI. India's filmmakers are embracing it
summary: While Hollywood debates AI's implications for storytelling, Indian filmmakers are actively embracing and experimenting with AI-driven film production techniques.
content: Even as Hollywood remains the world's most influential storyteller, experiments in AI filmmaking are increasingly happening in India.

zh.title: 《印度内幕》通讯：好莱坞在辩论AI，印度电影人正在拥抱它
zh.summary: 当好莱坞在辩论人工智能对故事讲述的影响时，印度电影制作人正在积极拥抱并尝试基于AI驱动的电影制作技术。

title: Oil jumps as U.S. fresh strikes on Iran raise worries of extended disruption to energy flows
summary: US military strikes on Iran drove oil prices higher Thursday amid concerns about potential energy supply disruptions. The geopolitical tensions could extend broader impacts on global energy markets.
content: Oil prices jumped on Thursday after the United States launched a fresh round of military strikes against targets in Iran.

zh.title: 美国新轮轰炸伊朗引发能源供应中断担忧，油价上涨
zh.summary: 美国军方对伊朗的轰炸周四推高油价，引发了对潜在能源供应中断的担忧。地缘政治紧张局势可能对全球能源市场产生更广泛的影响。

title: Oracle beats on earnings, but stock drops on plans to raise another $20 billion
summary: Oracle exceeded quarterly earnings expectations but announced plans to raise $20 billion for data center expansion, offsetting investor enthusiasm as negative free cash flow raised concerns. The capital needs reflect the high cost of AI infrastructure investment.
content: Oracle topped quarterly expectations, but free cash flow is negative, and the company plans to raise more capital for data center projects.

zh.title: 甲骨文盈利超预期，但因融资200亿美元计划股价下跌
zh.summary: 甲骨文超过了季度盈利预期，但宣布计划筹集200亿美元用于数据中心扩展，因负自由现金流引发的担忧抵消了投资者的热情。资本需求反映了AI基础设施投资的高成本。

title: My plumber charged $160 to fix the cistern on my toilet — but created another problem. Do I pay again?
summary: A homeowner questions whether they should pay additional charges after a plumber's repair work created a new problem with their toilet's constantly refilling cistern. The column addresses consumer rights when service work results in additional issues.
content: “The cistern on my toilet has been constantly refilling and making a hissing noise.”

zh.title: 水管工收费160美元修理马桶水箱，但制造了新问题。我应该再付钱吗？
zh.summary: 一位房主质疑在水管工的维修工作导致其马桶水箱持续加水的新问题后，他们是否应该支付额外费用。该专栏讨论了当服务工作导致额外问题时的消费者权益。
